# Develop with Redis

# Develop with Redis

Learn how to develop with Redis

| Try these Redis commands | |
|---|---|
`PING`
`HSET user:1 name antirez vocation artist`
`HGETALL user:1`
`SET e 2.71`
`INCRBYFLOAT e 0.43`
`RENAME e pi`
`GET pi` # See all commands |
|

Get a Redis server running in minutes with a free trial of Redis Cloud, or install Redis Open Source locally on your machine. Check out the Redis Docker Hub for the latest release. Then, explore Redis with your favorite programming language or analyze and manage your database with our UI tools:

|
Visual client tool for creating, managing, and analyzing Redis databases. |
VS Code extension for creating, managing, and analyzing Redis databases. |
